description: An aerospace engineer has been handed a Cessna 210 OpenVSP model file that was corrupted during a data entry process. The model is at /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/cessna210_corrupt.vsp3. Open it in OpenVSP and examine the wing geometry — the NormalWing component currently exhibits physically implausible geometry for a Cessna 210. Identify the incorrect wing section parameters, determine what the correct values should be based on the documented Cessna 210 airframe geometry, make the necessary corrections, and save the file back to the same path.
